creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://github.com/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/fae9e49dd63f411983cc9a7f62f0fa8418797b35> (2022-05-01)

> graphics: Delete drm-current-kmod and drm-devel-kmod
> 
> For now please use drm-510-kmod and if you have problems with it 
> please use drm-54-kmod and open a issue on 
> https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod


Affected descriptions include: 

<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-kmod/#description>

<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-fbsd12.0-kmod/#description>

<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-510-kmod/#description>

<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/gpu-firmware-kmod/#description> etc..
